mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_CHANGE_HISTORY ( CHANGE_ID, CHANGE_TYPE, TARGET_TYPE, TARGET_ID, TARGET_NM, CHANGE_CNT, SUMMARY, PREV_VALUE, CURR_VALUE, CHANGE_USER_ID, CHANGE_DT ) VALUES ( #{changeId}, #{changeType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{targetNm}, #{changeCnt}, #{summary}, #{prevValue}, #{currValue}, #{changeUserId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT CHANGE_ID AS "changeId", CHANGE_TYPE AS "changeType", TARGET_TYPE AS "targetType", TARGET_ID AS "targetId", TARGET_NM AS "targetNm", CHANGE_CNT AS "changeCnt", SUMMARY AS "summary", PREV_VALUE AS "prevValue", CURR_VALUE AS "currValue", CHANGE_USER_ID AS "changeUserId", TO_CHAR(CHANGE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "changeDt" FROM TB_CHANGE_HISTORY WHERE CHANGE_ID = #{changeId}

SELECT CHANGE_ID AS "changeId", SEQ AS "seq", TARGET_ID AS "targetId", TARGET_NM AS "targetNm", DETAIL_TYPE AS "detailType", PREV_VALUE AS "prevValue", CURR_VALUE AS "currValue", REMARK AS "remark" FROM TB_CHANGE_HISTORY_DETAIL WHERE CHANGE_ID = #{changeId} ORDER BY SEQ

SELECT CHANGE_ID AS "changeId", CHANGE_TYPE AS "changeType", SUMMARY AS "summary", PREV_VALUE AS "prevValue", CURR_VALUE AS "currValue", CHANGE_USER_ID AS "changeUserId", TO_CHAR(CHANGE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "changeDt" FROM TB_CHANGE_HISTORY WHERE TARGET_TYPE = #{targetType} AND TARGET_ID = #{targetId} ORDER BY CHANGE_DT DESC LIMIT 50
